body_txt: OK, so you love a good joke ? Probably not anything with laxatives or more deadly possibilities , but just the simple and mostly innocent classics designed to be one and done. Look, here comes your next mark. Wait for just the right moment, and... BINGO! Your little Silly String Spray, cream pie, Trick Bomb (particularly a Stink Bomb ), or water cannon was a direct hit, and the mark never saw it coming. But hold up there... is he upset or something? This is when a prank is treated as cruel, excessive or malicious in-universe. When considering an example, the details of the prank itself don't matter. Rather, the way the victim responds to the prank is the key to its qualification. The victim must express genuine hurt or anger at the prank and refuse to take the attempted comedy as an excuse . However, by the same token, this is for pranks that are merely mean — if people end up getting injured or killed (even if due to an emotional reaction, like the victim being Driven to Suicide or a Roaring Rampage of Revenge ) or in genuine danger of such, put it in Deadly Prank instead. May lead to Dude, Not Funny! . As mentioned, see Deadly Prank for when a prank goes from "not nice" to "actively dangerous". Since this trope involves an In-Universe reaction, not an Audience Reaction , Real Life examples should not be added lightly.
